query:
SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate, publishedToFeed,
       awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, bookTotal, awayML, homeML,
       spreadAwayBetsPct, spreadHomeBetsPct, spreadAwayMoneyPct, spreadHomeMoneyPct,
       totalOverBetsPct, totalUnderBetsPct, mlAwayBetsPct, mlHomeBetsPct
FROM games 
WHERE sport = 'NCAAM' 
  AND publishedToFeed = 1
ORDER BY gameDate, id;
